CSS.AllowedFonts TYPE: lookup/null VERSION: 4.3.0 DEFAULT: NULL --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Allows you to manually specify a set of allowed fonts. If <code>NULL</code>, all fonts are allowed. This directive affects generic names (serif, sans-serif, monospace, cursive, fantasy) as well as specific font families. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
